data.body:
=== SESSION SUMMARY (final) ===

GOAL: Fully implement the plan-review gate epic (5fd2 / messy-moose-jig), enable it in the local project config, and follow the repo's gate protocols.

OUTCOME — epic 5fd2 COMPLETE: the epic + all 14 children are CLOSED + completion-verifier CERTIFIED (zero force-closed/unsigned). Gate enabled in rebar.toml (verify.require_plan_review_for_claim = true). Shipped via PR #10 (merged to main, 15 commits).

WHAT SHIPPED (src/rebar/llm/plan_review/ + the prompt library):
- The gate: rebar review-plan (+ MCP review_plan) = DET floor P1-P8 (fail-open, only default-blocking tier) + three-pass review (find -> verify -> deterministic Pass-3) + Pass-4 affirmative coach; signs an attestation. Fast LOCAL claim gate (no LLM on the claim path) with --force + material-edit/HEAD invalidation; bugs/session_logs exempt.
- Prompts in the LIBRARY (not inline): 32 criteria + 6 pass prompts as contract-bearing reviewers/plan_review_*.md files resolved via get_prompt/resolve_prompt + .rebar/prompts overrides; routing in criteria_routing.json (the reviewer index.json analog).
- Size handling: runtime ladder (batch -> one-criterion-per-call -> escalate model -> P8 too-big block), per-plan budget cap + centrality + cap-hit INDETERMINATE shedding (agent/overlay first), chunk-atomic checkpointing (.rebar/cache, material-fingerprint keyed). sizing.py extracted to stay under the 800-LOC cap.
- G3/G4 container per-child loop; ISF fed the session log + pre-resolved ticket graph (summary fallback w/ reduced confidence); coaching-spec finding fields; REVIEW_RESULT reducer-ignored sidecar with retention prune + per-pass latency metrics; project-extensible coach moves; plan_review_verdict schema.
- Standing eval suite (Inspect-AI seam): finder/verifier/ISF specs (recall/false-accept/false-fire across DSO/snap/rebar), Pass-2 discrimination pairs, ISF cases, T12 discrimination, seeded from the observed-FP taxonomy; FP6/FP7 anti-FP tuning encoded into the verifier/T2/A1 prompts. (Human-adjudicated gold = best-effort seed; threshold/judge calibration is the epic's deferred post-implementation work this suite enables.)
- Docs: docs/plan-review-gate.md + docs/reuse-surface.md (signing/LLM-runtime/prompt-library/output-schema reference, with a CI anti-drift test) + CLAUDE.md gate protocols.

PROCESS: every ticket closed through the completion verifier, which caught REAL gaps I remediated each round (prompt-library migration, container loop, size ladder, ISF ticket-graph, coaching fields, budget cap, retention, checkpointing, eval fixtures, module-size split). A pre-PR subagent reviewed the whole branch; findings fixed. Corrected an early mistake: moved 2 direct main commits to a branch + PR (repo disallows direct main).

FOLLOW-ON (PR #11, open): Pydantic-style lint/format automation — Makefile (make format MUTATES = explicit-only; make lint/typecheck ERROR-only), check-only .pre-commit-config.yaml, exact ruff==0.15.19 pin (was >=0.6 floor) shared by make/pre-commit/CI, CI rewired through make lint/typecheck. Subagent-reviewed clean.

Full suite: 2873 passed / 0 failed; ruff + module-size + prompt-index gates green.
